message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "Kepala" as A
participant "Dashboard_V" as B
participant "DisposisiBKD_V" as C
participant "PDF_V" as D
participant "Admin_C" as E
participant "SuratDisposisi_C" as F
participant "SuratDisposisi_E" as G

A ->> B: 2 Halaman Dashboard
B ->> A: 3 klik menu Disposisi BKD
B ->> C: 4 disposisibkd()
C ->> F: 5
F ->> C: 6
C ->> B: 7 load->view()
B ->> A: 8 Halaman Disposisi BKD
A ->> C: 9 klik tombol Lihat File Disposisi BKD
C ->> D: 10 viewdisposisimail()
D ->> F: 11
F ->> D: 12
D ->> B: 13 load->view()
B ->> A: 14 Tampilan file Disposisi BKD

@enduml
